steps.assistant_text: Block-copy + byte-transform, 56.6%->exact. NEW LEVER: the li v0,1; sll v1,v0,2; addu residue is IDO -O2's LOOP-UNROLL SIGNATURE — the old straight-line pointer code was 4 insns short because there was no loop to unroll. Write the copy as a plain ROLLED loop; IDO unrolls to the target shape (iter 0 peeled with direct bases, then i=1 materialized + 4 iters at constant offsets off the shared i<<2 bases). CRITICAL: the loop must be BASE-0 — for(i=0;i<5;i++) a0[i+2]=a3[i+1] gives 32/32; the shifted-range equivalent for(i=1;i<6;i++) a0[i+1]=a3[i] materializes i=2 (23/32). Byte-transform part = the 99DC/9B60/9C04 comma-init family recipe.
